'''Operation: Clean Sweep''' was a campaign fought by the ruling [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] against the rebellious forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The engagements involved both Imperial assaults and Rebel counterstrikes, ranging from convoy strikes to frantic defense missions.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Battles==
===Dreadnaught ''Warlover'' Attacks Rebel Cargo Operation===
{{Main|Battle of Esyram}}
[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|TRN]] group ''Val'' was delivering supply containers to Rebel Alliance [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|CRS]] [[Valorous (MC80 Star Cruiser)|Valorous]] in the [[Esyram system/Legends|Esyram system]] when it was attacked by the Imperial [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Warlover]]'' and its starfighter complement.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Raid on Goibniu Platform===
{{Main|Battle of Goibniu}}
Rebel starfighters attacked the [[Goibniu Platform|Imperial supply depot]] in the [[Goibniu system/Legends|Goibniu system]] and attempted to steal some [[Class-E cargo container|Class-E Cargo Containers]] with [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] by means of six [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifters]] of HLF group ''SFNGR''.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Raid on Rebel Factory Koensayr 42===
{{Main|Battle of Koensayr 42}}
Imperial strike forces attacked Rebel Factory ''[[Koensayr 42]]'' as [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|ESC]] [[Eleusis]] was taking on a squadron of newly produced [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. During the battle, Imperial commandos tried to infiltrate the factory and plant a [[computer virus]] that would crash the remote-controlled Y-wings into the ''Eleusis'' instead of docking them.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Attack on ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer ''Tormentor''===
{{Main|Battle of Udnil II}}
HLF group ''[[Bellboy]]'' was retrieving supplies delivered by four ships of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|FRT]] group ''[[Monru]]'' for [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Tormentor/Legends|Tormentor]]'' near [[Udnil II]] when Rebel starfighters attacked.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Ambush of Rebel Leader at Airam Platform===
{{Main|Battle near Airam Platform}}
The Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CRV]] [[Intrepid (CR90 corvette)|''Intrepid'']] must flee from neutral [[Airam Platform|''PLT/1 Airam'']] under starfighter cover to evade a capture attempt by Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Gunboats]] and [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|Assault Transports]].<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Raid on Imperial Convoy near Atterol===
{{Main|Battle of Atterol}}
Rebel fighters raided a convoy consisting of [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|FRG]] ''[[Tegret]]'' and three ships of [[Modular conveyor|CNVYR]] group ''[[Xibo]]'' near the [[Atterol system/Legends|Atterol system]].<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Frigate Duel: ''Malevolent'' vs. ''Endeavor''===
{{Main|Battle between the Malevolent and the Endeavor}}
In an evenly matched fight, Imperial [[Malevolent|''FRG Malevolent'']] squared off against Rebel [[Endeavor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''FRG Endeavor'']].<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Attack on ''Victory''-class Star Destroyer ''Formidable''===
{{Main|Battle of Delalt}}
The [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Formidable (Victory-class)|''Formidable'']] was found to block a vital location in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] where a Rebel supply convoy was expected to pass in the near future. The Rebels launched a heavy starfighter attack against the ''Formidable'', but Imperial [[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''FRG Fury'']] joined the fray.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Emperor Palpatine has decreed that all Rebel insurgents meet the firm hand of Imperial justice. To reach this objective, military forces of the Imperial Navy are to conduct a search-and-destroy campaign to wipe out all Rebel strongholds.|In-game Battle description|<ref name="XWvTF" />}}
Operation: Clean Sweep is a "Battle" in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' computer game, i.e. a set of eight different missions grouped together without forming a coherent campaign. Battles do not follow a storyline and the missions have no clear chronological order.<ref name="XWvTF" />

Although the occurrence of the individual missions can be considered canonical, the outcome depends on the player's actions. Therefore, the actual canonical outcome of each mission is unclear. It is safe to assume that no side achieved a lasting effect (such as the destruction of a starship) over the course of the battle.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
